violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. The person listed as the CFSM does not work at this establishment.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Bare studs and dry wall located by the area that food is prepped and cooked.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Hand sink was being used to store/clean dishes.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Walls in the kitchen area have exposed studs.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
